english translation text:
Dua “Allahumma innaka ‘adheemun dhu anaatin”
Tofatus Saaemeen p350/p353
It is recommended to recite this Dua 21 times (time permitting)
In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: Oh Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: اللهم إنك عليم حليم ذو أناةٍ,
english translation text: Oh Allah, verily Thou art Sublime, Patient, gives respite,

arabic text: و لا طاقة لنا بحُكمك بحلمك
english translation text: (because) we do not have the capacity to withstand the conditions that take effect under Thy authority.

arabic text: يا الله يا الله يا الله
english translation text: Oh Allah! Oh Allah! Oh Allah!

arabic text: من الطاعون و الوباء و موتِ الفجأة,
english translation text: (Safety from the) rampant epidemics, accidental death,

arabic text: و سوء القضاء و و شماتة الأعداء,
english translation text: evil events, and rejoicing of enemies at (our) misfortune.
Oh our Lord take away from us the pain and torment,

arabic text: إنا مؤمنون برحمتك يا أرحم الراحمين
english translation text: Truly we believe in Thy Mercy, Oh the most Merciful!

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: Oh Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
